genre_refs: Rembrandt Peale, 'Washington before Yorktown' (classical history painting)
description: Department of Labor graphic built on an oil painting. The base image is Rembrandt Peale's equestrian portrait 'Washington before Yorktown,' showing General George Washington in a blue-and-buff Continental Army uniform with gold epaulettes mounted on a rearing pale/white horse, with an aide on horseback holding his hat beside him, and other mounted officers and soldiers in tricorn hats in the wooded background, in a warm oil-painting palette. Overlaid across the bottom in white cursive script is the line 'One American Heritage'.
